channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8712] conf-sanity_72 test failed Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: conf-sanity test_72: @@@@@@ FAIL: start mds failed
item.description:
A. stdout.log
fre902: mount.lustre: mount /dev/vdb at /mnt/mds1 failed: Address already in use
fre902: The target service's index is already in use. (/dev/vdb)
pdsh@fre907: fre902: ssh exited with exit code 98
Start of /dev/vdb on mds1 failed 98
conf-sanity test_72: @@@@@@ FAIL: start mds failed
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4672:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:4588:test_72()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4932:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4968:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/../tests/test-framework.sh:4774:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:4609:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/1464278010/conf-sanity.test_72.*.1464278222.log
Resetting fail_loc and fail_val on all nodes...done.
FAIL 72 (52s)

B. stdout.log:

device size = 2048MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/sdb
target name lustre:MDT0000
4k blocks 50000
options -J size=22 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:MDT0000 -J size=22 -I 512 -i 2048 -q -O dirdata,uninit_bg,^extents,dir_nlink,quota,huge_file,flex_bg -E lazy_itable_init,lazy_journal_init -F /dev/sdb 50000
conf-sanity test_72: @@@@@@ FAIL: add mds 1 failed
Trace dump:
= ./../tests/test-framework.sh:4840:error()
= conf-sanity.sh:5091:test_72()
= ./../tests/test-framework.sh:5116:run_one()
= ./../tests/test-framework.sh:5155:run_one_logged()
= ./../tests/test-framework.sh:4954:run_test()
= conf-sanity.sh:5119:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/1476556242/conf-sanity.test_72.*.1476556334.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...done.
FAIL 72 (12s)

B is because ldiskfs module was not present after doing load_modules before add mdt test failed with result A.
item.summary: conf-sanity_72 test failed Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: conf-sanity test_72: @@@@@@ FAIL: start mds failed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
jadhav.vikram (jadhav.vikram@seagate.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/23200
Subject: LU-8712 tests: refresh mgs config database before add mds
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1fe368be0f4c9d54cde63a594516ebd5e90cd9be
